citation.article_title: Re-envisioning numerical information field theory (NIFTy.re): A library for Gaussian processes and variational inference
citation.author: Edenhofer
citation.unstructured_citation: Edenhofer, G., Frank, P., Roth, J., Leike, R. H., Guerdi, M., Scheel-Platz, L. I., Guardiani, M., Eberle, V., Westerkamp, M., & Enßlin, T. A. (2024). Re-envisioning numerical information field theory (NIFTy.re): A library for Gaussian processes and variational inference. Journal of Open Source Software, 9(98), 6593. https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.06593

citation.author: Enßlin
citation.unstructured_citation: Enßlin, T. (2013). Information field theory. AIP Conference Proceedings. https://doi.org/10.1063/1.4819999

citation.article_title: NIFTY - Numerical Information Field Theory. A versatile PYTHON library for signal inference
citation.author: Selig
citation.unstructured_citation: Selig, M., Bell, M. R., Junklewitz, H., Oppermann, N., Reinecke, M., Greiner, M., Pachajoa, C., & Enßlin, T. A. (2013). NIFTY - Numerical Information Field Theory. A versatile PYTHON library for signal inference. Astronomy & Astrophysics, 554, A26. https://doi.org/10.1051/0004-6361/201321236

citation.article_title: NIFTy 3 - Numerical Information Field Theory: A Python framework for multicomponent signal inference on HPC clusters
citation.author: Steininger
citation.unstructured_citation: Steininger, T., Dixit, J., Frank, P., Greiner, M., Hutschenreuter, S., Knollmüller, J., Leike, R., Porqueres, N., Pumpe, D., Reinecke, M., Šraml, M., Varady, C., & Enßlin, T. (2019). NIFTy 3 - Numerical Information Field Theory: A Python framework for multicomponent signal inference on HPC clusters. Annalen Der Physik, 531(3), 1800290. https://doi.org/10.1002/andp.201800290

citation.article_title: Nifty5: Numerical information field theory v5
citation.author: Arras
citation.unstructured_citation: Arras, P., Baltac, M., Enßlin, T. A., Frank, P., Hutschenreuter, S., Knollmueller, J., Leike, R., Newrzella, M.-N., Platz, L., Reinecke, M., & others. (2019). Nifty5: Numerical information field theory v5. Astrophysics Source Code Library, ascl–1903.

citation.author: Knollmüller
citation.unstructured_citation: Knollmüller, J., & Enßlin, T. A. (2020). Metric Gaussian variational inference. https://arxiv.org/abs/1901.11033

citation.author: Frank
citation.unstructured_citation: Frank, P., Leike, R., & Enßlin, T. A. (2021). Geometric variational inference. Entropy, 23(7), 853. https://doi.org/10.3390/e23070853

citation.article_title: Butterfly transforms for efficient representation of spatially variant point spread functions in Bayesian imaging
citation.author: Eberle
citation.unstructured_citation: Eberle, V., Frank, P., Stadler, J., Streit, S., & Enßlin, T. (2023). Butterfly transforms for efficient representation of spatially variant point spread functions in Bayesian imaging. Entropy, 25(4). https://doi.org/10.3390/e25040652

citation.article_title: The first spatio-spectral Bayesian imaging of SN1006 in X-rays
citation.author: Westerkamp
citation.unstructured_citation: Westerkamp, M., Eberle, V., Guardiani, M., Frank, P., Scheel-Platz, L., Arras, P., Knollmüller, J., Stadler, J., & Enßlin, T. (2024). The first spatio-spectral Bayesian imaging of SN1006 in X-rays. Astronomy & Astrophysics, 684, A155. https://doi.org/10.1051/0004-6361/202347750

citation.article_title: Joint deconvolution of astronomical images in the presence of Poisson noise
citation.author: Donath
citation.unstructured_citation: Donath, A., Siemiginowska, A., Kashyap, V. L., van Dyk, D. A., & Burke, D. (2024). Joint deconvolution of astronomical images in the presence of Poisson noise. The Astronomical Journal, 168(4), 182. https://doi.org/10.3847/1538-3881/ad6b98

citation.article_title: LIRA The Low-Counts Image Restoration and Analysis Package: A teaching version via R
citation.author: Connors
citation.journal_title: Astronomical data analysis software and systems XX
citation.unstructured_citation: Connors, A., Stein, N. M., van Dyk, D., Kashyap, V., & Siemiginowska, A. (2011). LIRA The Low-Counts Image Restoration and Analysis Package: A teaching version via R. In I. N. Evans, A. Accomazzi, D. J. Mink, & A. H. Rots (Eds.), Astronomical data analysis software and systems XX (Vol. 442, p. 463).

citation.article_title: Variable structures in M87* from space, time and frequency resolved interferometry
citation.author: Arras
citation.unstructured_citation: Arras, P., Frank, P., Haim, P., Knollmüller, J., Leike, R., Reinecke, M., & Enßlin, T. (2022). Variable structures in M87* from space, time and frequency resolved interferometry. Nature Astronomy, 6(2), 259–269. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41550-021-01548-0

citation.article_title: JAX: Composable transformations of Python+NumPy programs
citation.author: Bradbury
citation.unstructured_citation: Bradbury, J., Frostig, R., Hawkins, P., Johnson, M. J., Leary, C., Maclaurin, D., Necula, G., Paszke, A., VanderPlas, J., Wanderman-Milne, S., & Zhang, Q. (2018). JAX: Composable transformations of Python+NumPy programs. http://github.com/jax-ml/jax

citation.author: Harris
citation.unstructured_citation: Harris, C. R., Millman, K. J., Walt, S. J. van der, Gommers, R., Virtanen, P., Cournapeau, D., Wieser, E., Taylor, J., Berg, S., Smith, N. J., Kern, R., Picus, M., Hoyer, S., Kerkwijk, M. H. van, Brett, M., Haldane, A., Fernández del Río, J., Wiebe, M., Peterson, P., … Oliphant, T. E. (2020). Array programming with NumPy. Nature, 585(7825), 357–362. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-020-2649-2

citation.article_title: SciPy 1.0: Fundamental algorithms for scientific computing in Python
citation.author: Virtanen
citation.unstructured_citation: Virtanen, P., Gommers, R., Oliphant, T. E., Haberland, M., Reddy, T., Cournapeau, D., Burovski, E., Peterson, P., Weckesser, W., Bright, J., Walt, S. J. van der, Brett, M., Wilson, J., Millman, K. J., Mayorov, N., Nelson, A. R. J., Jones, E., Kern, R., Larson, E., … SciPy 1.0 Contributors. (2020). SciPy 1.0: Fundamental algorithms for scientific computing in Python. Nature Methods, 17(3), 261–272. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-019-0686-2

citation.article_title: The Astropy project: Sustaining and growing a community-oriented open-source project and the latest major release (v5.0) of the core package
citation.author: Astropy Collaboration
citation.unstructured_citation: Astropy Collaboration. (2022). The Astropy project: Sustaining and growing a community-oriented open-source project and the latest major release (v5.0) of the core package. The Astrophysical Journal, 935(2), 167. https://doi.org/10.3847/1538-4357/ac7c74

citation.article_title: Latent-space field tension for astrophysical component detection - an application to X-ray imaging
citation.author: Guardiani
citation.unstructured_citation: Guardiani, M., Eberle, V., Westerkamp, M., Rüstig, J., Frank, P., & Enßlin, T. (2025). Latent-space field tension for astrophysical component detection - an application to X-ray imaging. Astronomy & Astrophysics, 703, A203. https://doi.org/10.1051/0004-6361/202556103

citation.article_title: Bayesian multiband imaging of SN1987A in the Large Magellanic Cloud with SRG/eROSITA
citation.author: Eberle
citation.unstructured_citation: Eberle, V., Guardiani, M., Westerkamp, M., Frank, P., Freyberg, M., Salvato, M., & Enßlin, T. (2026). Bayesian multiband imaging of SN1987A in the Large Magellanic Cloud with SRG/eROSITA. Astronomy & Astrophysics, 706, A229. https://doi.org/10.1051/0004-6361/202452669
